question: Why did improper-payment recovery slip 18% YoY for tier-3 program offices in Q2, while tier-1 hit target?
metric_label: Recovery by office tier, program, and quarter

upstream_models.description: Improper payment records from Treasury IPP feed via Fivetran CDC. Includes payment_date, program_code, office_tier, recovery_status, and recovery_amount.
Vendor-match lookup from SAM.gov feed. Includes sam_entity_status, debarment_flag, and last_verified_date. Drives the automated recovery trigger.
Program office master with office_tier classification (1-4), bureau_division, and recovery_target_pct. Joins to fct_improper_payment to split tier analysis.
Federal fiscal calendar with fiscal_quarter, fiscal_year, and quarter_start/end dates. Required for Q2 YoY comparison against prior-year snapshot.
